steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that ecosystems stretch across the border, so actions on one side affect the other, making international cooperation essential.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Define: the blank must mean "necessitates" or "demands" — the passage says cooperation is essential, showing a strict logical need. Substitute each choice: A) requires coordination — managing border issues demands it; fits the necessity signal perfectly. B) praises coordination — praising something is an endorsement, not a statement of need; eliminated. C) reports coordination — reporting is a neutral act of informing, not asserting necessity; eliminated. D) advises coordination — advising is a recommendation, weaker than an essential requirement; eliminated. Verdict: A is correct.
